title: ingress.resubmit
description: Published when a quarantined chunk is resubmitted for re-processing. Two flavors: (a) replay of the original bronze payload through the current mapping; (b) fresh payload uploaded by the tenant to replace the quarantined one. Consumed by the streaming consumer; separate from ingress.ready so resubmit traffic is observable independently.

trace_id.description: New trace_id for this resubmit event. Different from the original.

parent_trace_id.description: Trace_id of the quarantined chunk being resubmitted. Required.

tenant_id.description: Internal tenant UUID, identical to Customer Master core.tenants.id and identity_mirror.tenants.tenant_id. Load-bearing identity.

store_id.description: Internal store UUID, identical to Customer Master core.stores.id and identity_mirror.stores.store_id. Load-bearing identity.

tenant_display_code.description: Customer Master's authoritative external code for the tenant (tenants.display_code). Optional in the schema, but producers MUST populate it when publishing. Readability only, never a substitute for tenant_id.

store_code.description: Customer Master's authoritative external code for the store (stores.store_code). Optional in the schema, but producers MUST populate it when present in Customer Master. Readability only, never a substitute for store_id.

resubmit_type.description: replay: re-process the original bronze payload (bronze_ref and gcs_uri match parent). fixed_file: tenant uploaded a corrected file (new bronze_ref and gcs_uri).

bronze_ref.description: For replay: same as parent's bronze_ref. For fixed_file: new bronze row created by the receiver path for the corrected upload.

gcs_uri.description: Full GCS URI of the payload. Path scheme enforced by libs/dis-storage; the tenant segment is the internal tenant UUID.

initiated_by.description: Who triggered the resubmit. Optional; defaults to tenant if absent.

chain_depth.description: How many resubmit hops deep this chunk is. Hard cap of 3 enforced by the publisher; messages exceeding this are rejected at validation.

reason.description: Free-text note from the operator or the UI. Optional.
